creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-13 13:15:57 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/rubygem-captcha Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  A simple CAPTCHA ("Completely Automatic Public Turing Test to Tell Computers
  and Humans Apart") written in Ruby. This will dynamically create an image
  containing a key displayed on a noisy background, which the user must enter
  into a text box.
  
  WWW: http://captcha.rubyforge.org/
  
  PR:             ports/110265
  Submitted by:   Alexander Logvinov <ports at logvinov.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1047    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/graphics/rubygem-captcha/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/graphics/rubygem-captcha/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/graphics/rubygem-captcha/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +82 -0     ports/graphics/rubygem-captcha/pkg-plist (new)
